pr_summary: PR adds changes in javascript — Add bulk fetch and fix password reset

findings.recommendation: Use IN clause to fetch all users in a single query

findings.description: Missing bulk operations in resetPassword function
findings.recommendation: Use a single UPDATE query with a WHERE clause to update multiple users at once

findings.description: Unbounded memory growth in getUserActivity function
findings.recommendation: Use a streaming approach or pagination to limit the amount of data fetched and processed

positive_observations: Code is structured into focused, single-responsibility functions
Error handling is present in several paths
